translatedEffectText: 把 1 张 "Synchron" Tuner 从卡组加入手牌， then send the top card of 你的卡组 to the 墓地。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以从卡组把指定卡加入手牌；效果与墓地资源有关。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在回合前段使用，先把需要的资源加入手牌，再安排后续展开。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Twister
effectText: Pay 500 LP, then target 1 face-up Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target.
translatedEffectText: Pay 500 LP， then target 1 表侧表示 Spell/Trap 场上； 破坏那只怪兽。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：会破坏场上的卡；发动时需要选择目标。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在对手场上出现关键卡时使用，优先处理高威胁目标。
synergyNotes: 适合与其他干扰卡搭配，形成连续压制或多段打断。

name: Aluber the Jester of Despia
effectText: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Branded" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If a face-up Fusion Monster you control is destroyed by battle, or leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect, while this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; Special Summon this card, and if you do, negate the targeted monster's effects until the end of this turn. You can only use 1 "Aluber the Jester of Despia" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
translatedEffectText: If this card is Normal or 特殊召唤： 你可以 把 1 张 "Branded" Spell/Trap 从卡组加入手牌。 If a 表侧表示 Fusion 怪兽 你控制的 is destroyed by battle， or leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect， while this card is in your 墓地： 你可以 target 1 Effect 怪兽 对手 controls； 将这张卡特殊召唤， and if you do， negate the targeted 怪兽's effects until the end of this turn。 你可以 only use 1 "Aluber the Jester of Despia" effect per turn， and only once that turn。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；可以从卡组把指定卡加入手牌；会破坏场上的卡；可以无效对手的效果或发动。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Cyber Valley
effectText:
You can use 1 of these effects.
● When this card is targeted for an attack by an opponent's monster: You can banish this card; draw 1 card, then end the Battle Phase.
● You can target 1 face-up monster you control and this card; banish both that target and this card, then draw 2 cards.
● You can target 1 card in your GY; banish both this card and 1 card from your hand, then place that target on top of the Deck.

translatedEffectText: 盖放 2 Field Spells with different names from 你的卡组 场上 (1 on your field， and 1 on 对手's field)。 While either of those cards remain 盖放 场上， neither player can activate or 盖放 other Field Spells。
childFriendlySummary: 这张卡的效果描述比较偏规则文本，建议结合中文说明逐句查看。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在最能扩大收益的时点使用，优先服务自己当前回合的关键动作。
synergyNotes: 适合结合当前卡组核心思路使用，优先与能放大这张卡收益的资源配合。

name: Shadow Spell
effectText: Activate this card by targeting 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses 700 ATK, also it cannot attack or change its battle position. When it leaves the field, destroy this card.
translatedEffectText: Activate this card by targeting 1 表侧表示 怪兽 对手 controls； it loses 700 攻击力， also it cannot attack or change its battle position。 When it leaves the field， destroy this card。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：会破坏场上的卡；会限制怪兽攻击；发动时需要选择目标。
recommendedUsage: 推荐先盖放，等对手做出关键动作后再发动，用来打断展开或解掉威胁。
synergyNotes: 适合与其他干扰卡搭配，形成连续压制或多段打断。

name: Six Samurai United
effectText: Each time a "Six Samurai" monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned, place 1 Bushido Counter on this card (max. 2). You can send this card to the GY; draw 1 card for each Bushido Counter on this card.
translatedEffectText: Each time a "Six Samurai" 怪兽(s) is Normal or 特殊召唤， place 1 Bushido Counter on this card (max。 2)。 你可以 send this card to the 墓地； 抽 1 张卡 for each Bushido Counter on this card。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；可以补充手牌；效果与墓地资源有关。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Skill Successor

name: Chaos Angel
effectText:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner LIGHT or DARK monsters
For this card's Synchro Summon, you can treat 1 LIGHT or DARK monster you control as a Tuner. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 card on the field; banish it. This card gains these effects based on the original Attributes of materials used for its Synchro Summon.
● LIGHT: Synchro Monsters you control are unaffected by monster effects activated by your opponent.
● DARK: Monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle.

2 Level 2 monsters
Once per turn: You can discard 1 card, then target 1 card your opponent controls, or up to 2 if this card has "Purrely Sleepy Memory" as material; return that card(s) to the hand. Up to thrice per turn, when you activate a "Purrely" Quick-Play Spell Card (Quick Effect): You can attach that card on the field to this card as material, then you can Set 1 "Purrely" Trap directly from your Deck.

Once per turn, during either player's Main Phase, if this card is in your Graveyard: You can discard 1 "Monarch" Spell/Trap Card, then target 1 monster in your Graveyard with 2400 or more ATK and 1000 DEF; add it to your hand.

This card gains 500 ATK for each card in your hand. Once per turn, during either player's turn, when a Spell Card is activated: You can negate the activation. If this card is destroyed by battle, or if this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Silent Magician" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Silent Magician", ignoring its Summoning conditions.
translatedEffectText: 不能通常召唤/盖放。 Must be 特殊召唤 (from 你的手牌) by Tributing 1 Spellcaster-Type 怪兽， and cannot be 特殊召唤 by other ways。 This card gains 500 攻击力 for each card in 你的手牌。 1 回合 1 次， during either player's turn， when a Spell Card is activated： 你可以 那次发动无效。 If this card is destroyed by battle， or if this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect： 你可以 特殊召唤 1 只 "Silent Magician" 怪兽 从手牌或卡组， except "Silent Magician"， ignoring its Summoning conditions。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；会破坏场上的卡；可以无效对手的效果或发动；会提升怪兽攻击力。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。
